reference: Hello, my girlfriend and I had sexual intercourse on February eight, two thousand and fourteen, without using a condom, but for a short duration. After that, I used a condom and ejaculated inside the condom. Is there any chance of pregnancy? When I inserted into her vagina without a condom, my penis was wet. Also, her last period was on January thirteen, two thousand and fourteen, and she was worried because she said that her menstrual cycle is twenty-six days. According to this, her period should have come on February nine or ten, but it didn't. Please give me some suggestions.
text: なんでこんなにおいしいの?嬉しい。
